title: Xtra Vibrant Mediterranean Vegetable Paella
description: This show-stopping paella is a masterclass in Mediterranean flavors and textures, featuring a vibrant blue hue and a delicate floral note, all while being vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Heat the infused olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced zucchini and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the soaked saffron threads, blue food coloring, and vegetable broth to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then add the uncooked Arborio rice and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer, covered, until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the artichoke hearts and cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes before serving.
